Guard: The north gate is sealed until the moon bell rings.
Merchant: Bring me three wolf pelts and I will trade you a lantern.
Healer: Rest here before you enter the ruins.
Scout: Bandits crossed the old bridge at dawn.
Blacksmith: The blade needs ironwood charcoal before it can hold an edge.
Mage: The shrine answers only when the river stone is carried home.
Captain: Report to the keep after you speak with the villagers.
Child: I saw blue fire under the well last night.
Ranger: Tracks lead east toward the broken watchtower.
Innkeeper: Travelers say the forest whispers names after midnight.
